pr.title: Add depth recurrence + SwiGLU submission (Apple M3 8GB)

output.summary: Depth recurrence reuses 4 unique transformer blocks with per-pass gates plus SwiGLU MLPs to enable a wider 640-dim U-Net variant on constrained Apple M3 hardware.
techniques: Depth recurrence with learnable gate scalars to emulate 12 layers from 4 unique blocks
SwiGLU MLPs at 2/3 hidden dim for parameter-efficiency in the MLP
Wider 640-dim U-Net-style model with grad clipping for stability
